mapper.select: SELECT d.device_name AS deviceName, SUM(po.purchase_quantity) AS purchaseQuantity, SUM(po.total_amount) AS totalAmount, DATE_FORMAT(po.purchase_date, '%Y-%m') AS yearMonth FROM purchase_order po LEFT JOIN device d ON po.device_id = d.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(po.purchase_date, '%Y') = #{year} GROUP BY po.device_id, yearMonth ORDER BY yearMonth, deviceName

SELECT d.device_name AS deviceName, SUM(po.purchase_quantity) AS purchaseQuantity, SUM(po.total_amount) AS totalAmount, DATE_FORMAT(po.purchase_date, '%Y') AS year FROM purchase_order po LEFT JOIN device d ON po.device_id = d.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(po.purchase_date, '%Y') = #{year} GROUP BY po.device_id, year ORDER BY deviceName
